mapper.select:
SELECT health_sense_id , title , link_url , attach_filename , writed_at FROM health_sense WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT #{firstRecordIndex}, #{recordCountPerPage}

SELECT health_sense_id , title , link_url , attach_filename , attach_filename AS org_attach_filename , writed_at , writed_user_id FROM health_sense WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND health_sense_id = #{healthSenseId}
